source: Synthetic — companion to fixture 01, isolates the no-overlap CREATE path. No music block on the day; only an unrelated 4 PM Math Class.

input.subject: Reminder: Piano Class tonight at 7:30 PM
input.bodyTruncated:
Hi Rebekah,

This is a friendly reminder that Madi has Piano Class tonight, Wednesday May 27, 2026 at 7:30 PM with Mr. Daniels at Step Up Music Academy.

Location: 1240 Oakland Ave, Clermont, FL 34711
Duration: 30 minutes

Please arrive 5 minutes early. If you need to cancel or reschedule, reply to this email or call (352) 555-0142.

Step Up Music Academy

notes: Validates the 11-02 interval-overlap substrate: candidate 7:30-8:00 PM does NOT overlap the 4-5 PM Math Class, so findIntervalOverlaps returns []. The arbiter is never called and the orchestrator CREATEs the event deterministically. This is the false-positive avoidance test for the 2026-05-26 incident — under Phase 11 the bug is dodged at the matching layer without burning a Haiku call.
